summary: Iteration 162: Shared Service Layer Extension (v78.0.0) - All tests PASSED. Shared JS modules (cashbook-service.js, hemali-service.js, staff-service.js) work correctly in both desktop-app and local-server. All 11 route files load successfully with shared modules. Web backend APIs (cash-book, quick-search, private-paddy) working. Frontend loads correctly with v78.0.0 version displayed.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: cashbook-service.js exports all 6 functions (autoDetectPartyType, retroFixPartyType, createCashTxnSideEffects, deleteCashTxnSideEffects, ciMatch, ciContains)
PASS: hemali-service.js exports all 6 functions (filterByFy, getAdvanceBalance, calcHemaliTotals, markHemaliPaidSideEffects, undoHemaliPaidSideEffects, deleteHemaliPaymentSideEffects)
PASS: staff-service.js exports all 5 functions (calculateAdvanceBalance, createStaffAdvanceCashEntries, deleteStaffAdvanceCashEntries, createStaffPaymentCashEntry, deleteStaffPaymentCashEntry)
PASS: autoDetectPartyType correctly identifies all 8 party types (Pvt Paddy Purchase, Rice Sale, Diesel, Local Party, Truck, Agent, Staff, Cash Party)
PASS: getAdvanceBalance calculates correct sardar advance balance (500 = (500-200) + (300-100))
PASS: calculateAdvanceBalance returns correct staff balance (6000 = 8000 - 2000)
PASS: All 11 desktop-app route files load successfully with shared modules
PASS: All 11 local-server route files load successfully with shared modules
PASS: shared/ folder is 100% identical between desktop-app and local-server
PASS: Route files are identical (local-server has 2 expected extras: cmr_exports.js, ledgers.js)
PASS: Web backend GET /api/cash-book returns transactions
PASS: Web backend POST /api/cash-book creates transaction with auto-detected party_type
PASS: Web backend GET /api/quick-search returns grouped results
PASS: Web backend POST /api/private-paddy creates entry with calculated fields
PASS: Web backend GET /api/private-paddy returns entries
PASS: Frontend loads correctly with v78.0.0 version in header and footer
PASS: Quick Search button visible and functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared service layer refactoring complete for v78.0.0. The shared modules (cashbook-service.js, hemali-service.js, staff-service.js, payment-service.js, paddy-calc.js, party-helpers.js) are in /app/desktop-app/shared/ and /app/local-server/shared/. Both directories have identical copies. All 11 route files (cashbook, hemali, staff, private_trading, payments, diesel, entries, milling, salebook, truck_lease, local_party) load successfully with shared modules. The web backend (Python/MongoDB) was NOT changed - only the JS backends were refactored.
